name: Ailee Villa & Khách sạn Tam Cốc (Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc)
address: Coi Khe Ninh Hai Hoa Lu Ninh Binh, Động Tam Cốc - Bích Động, Ninh Bình, Việt Nam
description:
Khám Phá Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc - Ninh Bình, Điểm Đến Lý Tưởng Cho Kỳ Nghỉ Của Bạn

Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc là khách sạn 4 sao sang trọng nằm ở trung tâm của khu vực nổi tiếng Tam Coc, Ninh Bình. Với thiết kế tinh tế và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp, khách sạn mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp thiên nhiên và di sản văn hóa đặc sắc của vùng đất này. Khách sạn chỉ có một phòng duy nhất, tạo cảm giác riêng tư và yên bình cho từng khách lưu trú.

Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 14:00 chiều, giúp quý khách có thể thư giãn sau chuyến đi dài và tận hưởng không khí trong lành của vùng đất này. Thời gian trả phòng linh hoạt đến 12:00 trưa hôm sau, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi để chuẩn bị cho hành trình tiếp theo. Đặc biệt, khách sạn còn có chính sách thân thiện với trẻ nhỏ, cho phép trẻ từ 1 đến 2 tuổi được ở miễn phí, giúp gia đình có thể thoải mái hơn khi nghỉ dưỡng tại đây. Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc chính là nơi lý tưởng để lưu giữ những kỷ niệm đẹp trong chuyến du lịch của bạn tại Ninh Bình.

Tiện Nghi Giải Trí Độc Đáo tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc

Tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm không gian thư giãn tuyệt vời với hồ bơi nước nóng (hot tub) sang trọng, lý tưởng để thư giãn sau những ngày khám phá vẻ đẹp của Ninh Bình. Hồ bơi nước nóng không chỉ mang lại cảm giác thoải mái, mà còn giúp giảm căng thẳng, mang đến những phút giây thư giãn hoàn hảo cho mọi khách lưu trú.

Bên cạnh đó, khu vườn xinh xắn xung quanh khách sạn là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức không khí trong lành, hòa mình vào thiên nhiên yên bình. Khách có thể dạo bộ, thư giãn trong không gian xanh mát, hoặc tận hưởng những buổi sáng sớm yên bình bên tách trà hoặc cà phê, mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng trọn vẹn và đậm chất thiên nhiên tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc.

Tiện ích thể thao tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc

Tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc, du khách có cơ hội thư giãn và rèn luyện sức khỏe với hồ bơi ngoài trời rộng lớn và thiết kế hiện đại. Hồ bơi không chỉ mang lại cảm giác mát mẻ, dễ chịu trong những ngày hè oi bức mà còn là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn sau những ngày khám phá vẻ đẹp của Ninh Bình. Không gian xung quanh hồ bơi được trang trí hài hòa, mang lại cảm giác thoải mái và gần gũi với thiên nhiên, giúp du khách có những phút giây thư thái, tận hưởng bầu không khí trong lành.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Lợi Tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc

Tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm những tiện nghi hiện đại và tiện lợi để chuyến lưu trú của mình trở nên thoải mái nhất có thể. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là và giặt khô chuyên nghiệp, giúp bạn giữ gìn quần áo luôn sạch sẽ và tươi mới trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Dịch vụ phòng 24/7 đảm bảo mọi nhu cầu của khách hàng đều được đáp ứng nhanh chóng và chu đáo, mang đến cảm giác như đang ở nhà. Ngoài ra, khách còn được tận hưởng kết nối Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng, giúp bạn dễ dàng liên lạc và cập nhật thông tin mọi lúc mọi nơi. Với dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, không gian lưu trú luôn sạch sẽ, gọn gàng, mang lại cảm giác dễ chịu và thư thái cho du khách.

Tiện Nghi Giao Thông Hiện Đại Tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc

Tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay tiện lợi, giúp chuyến đi của bạn trở nên dễ dàng và thoải mái hơn bao giờ hết. Đội ngũ nhân viên chuyên nghiệp luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ để đảm bảo bạn có những giờ phút di chuyển suôn sẻ từ sân bay đến khách sạn. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn còn cung cấp chỗ đậu xe rộng rãi, an toàn và miễn phí cho tất cả khách lưu trú, giúp bạn yên tâm về phương tiện di chuyển trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Với các tiện ích giao thông hiện đại này, Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc cam kết mang đến cho du khách sự thuận tiện tối đa để khám phá vẻ đẹp của Ninh Bình một cách dễ dàng và thoải mái nhất.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Sang Trọng tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc

Tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc, mỗi phòng nghỉ được trang bị đầy đủ các tiện nghi cao cấp nhằm mang đến sự thoải mái tối đa cho khách hàng. Bạn sẽ tận hưởng không khí mát mẻ dễ chịu từ hệ thống điều hòa nhiệt độ, cùng với đó là bộ đồ tắm bathrobes sang trọng để thư giãn sau những chuyến khám phá. Các phòng còn có ban công hoặc sân thượng, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức không gian yên bình và ngắm nhìn cảnh đẹp xung quanh.

Chúng tôi cung cấp các tiện ích như máy sấy tóc, khăn tắm mềm mại, cùng các sản phẩm vệ sinh cá nhân toiletries. Để thêm phần tiện lợi, mỗi phòng còn có rèm cản sáng giúp bạn dễ dàng nghỉ ngơi, cùng với nước khoáng miễn phí, trà và cà phê pha nhanh miễn phí để bạn bắt đầu ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng. Tất cả những tiện nghi này đều hướng đến việc mang lại trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng thoải mái và thư giãn tối đa cho khách lưu trú tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc.

Tiện Nghi Ẩm Thực Đẳng Cấp Tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc

Tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ ẩm thực đa dạng và tiện lợi ngay trong khuôn viên khách sạn. Nhà hàng của chúng tôi phục vụ các món ăn đặc sản địa phương và quốc tế, mang đến cho quý khách những bữa ăn ngon miệng trong không gian ấm cúng và thân thiện. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ phòng luôn sẵn sàng phục vụ 24/7, giúp bạn thưởng thức những món ăn yêu thích ngay trong phòng riêng, phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu và lịch trình của bạn.

Để đảm bảo sự sạch sẽ và thoải mái tối đa, Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc còn cung cấp dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, giúp duy trì môi trường sạch sẽ, gọn gàng và luôn mới mẻ cho khách lưu trú. Với sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa ẩm thực đa dạng và dịch vụ tiện ích, chúng tôi cam kết mang lại trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng trọn vẹn và đáng nhớ cho mọi du khách.

Trải Nghiệm Các Loại Phòng Đa Dạng Tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc

Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc mang đến cho quý khách nhiều lựa chọn phòng đa dạng phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu lưu trú. Bạn có thể lựa chọn phòng Superior Double rộng 22 mét vuông để tận hưởng không gian thoải mái, hoặc nâng cấp lên phòng Deluxe Double 25 mét vuông để có thêm sự tiện nghi. Đối với những gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn đông người, phòng Luxury Family rộng 30 mét vuông với 2 giường đôi sẽ là sự lựa chọn lý tưởng, mang lại không gian rộng rãi và thoải mái cho mọi thành viên.

Ngoài ra, khách hàng còn có thể chọn phòng Triple Bed rộng 35 mét vuông với 3 giường đôi để phù hợp cho nhóm lớn, hoặc các phòng có view vườn như Double Room Garden View và Garden Deluxe Room, giúp bạn tận hưởng vẻ đẹp tự nhiên xung quanh. Đặt phòng qua Agoda không chỉ đảm bảo bạn nhận được mức giá tốt nhất mà còn mang lại trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, nhanh chóng và không gặp rắc rối, giúp bạn có thêm nhiều thời gian để chuẩn bị cho chuyến đi của mình.

Hướng Dẫn Di Chuyển Từ Sân Bay Đến Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc, Ninh Bình

Từ các sân bay gần Ninh Bình như Sân bay Nội Bài (Hà Nội) hoặc Sân bay Thọ Xuân (Thanh Hóa), du khách có thể dễ dàng di chuyển đến Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc bằng nhiều phương tiện khác nhau. Nếu bắt đầu từ Sân bay Nội Bài, bạn có thể chọn dịch vụ xe riêng, xe đưa đón hoặc xe khách để đến Ninh Bình. Chuyến hành trình bằng ô tô riêng hoặc xe limousine sẽ mất khoảng 2,5 đến 3 giờ, mang lại sự thoải mái và tiện lợi, đặc biệt nếu bạn đi cùng gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn lớn. Trong khi đó, các xe khách liên tỉnh xuất phát từ Hà Nội sẽ đưa bạn đến trung tâm Ninh Bình, từ đó dễ dàng thuê taxi hoặc xe ôm để đến khách sạn chỉ trong vòng 30 phút đến 1 giờ đồng hồ.

Khi đến Ninh Bình, bạn có thể thuê taxi hoặc xe ôm để di chuyển đến Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc, nằm tại khu vực Động Tam Cốc - Bích Động, nổi tiếng với cảnh quan thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp và những điểm tham quan lịch sử. Để thuận tiện hơn, nhiều khách sạn và dịch vụ vận chuyển địa phương cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón tận nơi, giúp bạn tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức. Dù lựa chọn phương tiện nào, hành trình từ sân bay đến khách sạn đều mang đến trải nghiệm thú vị khi bạn bắt đầu khám phá vẻ đẹp mê hoặc của Ninh Bình ngay từ những bước chân đầu tiên.

Các Nhà Hàng Gần Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc

Khu vực xung quanh Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc là một thiên đường ẩm thực đa dạng và phong phú. Du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn truyền thống Việt Nam tại An Tam Coc Restaurant & Coffee hoặc khám phá ẩm thực chay tại Tam Coc Lantern - Vietnamese Restaurant & Vegetarian Food. Đối với những ai yêu thích bánh mì, Minh Khoi Restaurant and Foods Banh Mi là điểm đến lý tưởng. Những quán bar và nhà hàng như Chookie's Beer Garden và Nam Coffee Beer Garden mang đến không khí sôi động cùng các loại đồ uống phong phú. Ngoài ra, Ngon Vegan Restaurant, Thuy Linh Restaurant, Lantern's Restaurant, Father Cooking Restaurant và Happy Wind - Vietnamese Restaurant & Mexico Food đều góp phần làm phong phú thêm trải nghiệm ẩm thực của du khách, từ các món ăn truyền thống đến các đặc sản quốc tế.

Giá phòng tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc so với mức trung bình tại Ninh Bình

Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc nổi bật với mức giá phòng dao động từ 51 đến 75 USD, mang lại trải nghiệm lưu trú cao cấp và tiện nghi cho du khách. Trong khi đó, mức giá trung bình của các khách sạn khác tại Ninh Bình thường nằm trong khoảng 26 đến 50 USD, phản ánh sự đa dạng về chất lượng và dịch vụ. Điều này cho thấy Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc hướng đến nhóm khách hàng tìm kiếm dịch vụ tốt hơn, đồng thời mang lại giá trị vượt trội so với mức giá trung bình của thành phố.

Với mức giá cao hơn mức trung bình của Ninh Bình, khách lưu trú tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc có thể tận hưởng các tiện nghi hiện đại, không gian thoáng đãng và dịch vụ chăm sóc khách hàng tận tâm. Đây là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ đẳng cấp tại trung tâm của vùng đất nổi tiếng này, đồng thời tận hưởng những dịch vụ vượt trội mà khách sạn mang lại.

Đánh Giá Tích Cực Về Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc

Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc nhận được những đánh giá vô cùng tích cực từ khách hàng, thể hiện sự hài lòng về chất lượng dịch vụ và trải nghiệm tại đây. Với điểm số tổng thể ấn tượng 9.4, khách lưu trú đều cảm thấy hài lòng về mức giá hợp lý cùng các dịch vụ mà khách sạn cung cấp, mang lại giá trị vượt mong đợi. Các tiện nghi trong khách sạn được đánh giá cao với điểm số 9.3, cho thấy sự chú trọng đến từng chi tiết để mang lại sự tiện nghi tối đa cho khách hàng.

Ngoài ra, sự sạch sẽ và vị trí thuận tiện của khách sạn cũng góp phần làm tăng trải nghiệm của khách lưu trú, với điểm số lần lượt là 9.4 và 9.3. Đặc biệt, đội ngũ nhân viên tại Ailee Villa&Hotel Tam Coc được đánh giá xuất sắc với điểm số 9.6 về hiệu suất làm việc, luôn thân thiện, chu đáo và sẵn sàng hỗ trợ khách hàng mọi lúc mọi nơi. Tất cả những yếu tố này đã tạo nên một không gian nghỉ dưỡng lý tưởng, khiến khách hàng không ngần ngại quay trở lại và giới thiệu cho bạn bè, người thân khi có dịp ghé thăm Ninh Bình.

sample_comments.text: Đặc biệt hài lòng với nhân viên ở đây, nhiệt tình, thân thiện. Không gian đẹp, trong lành, phòng sạch sẽ
sample_comments.title: Rất tuyệt!!!
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Cao Cấp Cho Hai Người

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Mọi thứ
sample_comments.negatives: Mất điện ban đêm vì quá tải chắc vậy

sample_comments.text: Chỗ nghỉ rất đẹp, không gian yên tĩnh, nhiều cây xanh nên cảm giác cực kỳ thư giãn. Phòng sạch sẽ, đầy đủ tiện nghi, nhân viên nhiệt tình và thân thiện. Rất thích hợp để nghỉ dưỡng và "chữa lành".
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Cao Cấp Cho Hai Người

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Homestay đẹp xinh lắm ạ. Nhân viên nhiệt tình ạ.

sample_comments.text: Chỗ ở sạch sẽ, rộng rãi. Nhân viên nhiệt tình. Phòng ở phong cách tối giản nên rất hợp nghỉ dưỡng phục hồi. View đồng lúa rất đáng đống tiền vì xanh, mát và yên bình.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Đôi Sang Trọng Có Ban Công

sample_comments.title: Một nơi đáng để nghỉ dưỡng
sample_comments.positives: Quán ok rất hài lòng, ông chủ xách đồ rất nhiệt tình, view rất đẹp yên tĩnh phòng nghỉ sạch sẽ. Sẽ ưu tiên đến vào những lần tiếp theo..
sample_comments.negatives: Mười điểm

sample_comments.text: Chỗ ở ngay trung tâm Tam Cốc, thuận tiện di chuyển và ăn uống. Phòng sạch, đẹp và rộng rãi. View cánh đồng rất đáng đồng tiền, rất phù hợp nghỉ dưỡng và phục hồi
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Khách sạn nhỏ xinh. Các anh chị ở villa siêu nhiệt tình và dễ thương

sample_comments.text: Vị trí thuận lợi di chuyển kdl Tam Cốc, villa rất đẹp, sạch sẽ, tiện nghi tốt, nhân viên nhiệt tình, ăn ngon
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.room_type: Phòng Cao Cấp Cho Hai Người

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời, tất cả mọi thứ đều xinh, từ cô chủ, lễ tân cho đến các cô dọn phòng đều dễ mến. Các bạn hãy đặt Ailee cho kì
sample_comments.positives: Buffe sáng siêu ngon siêu ok

sample_comments.title: Looking nice but not really
sample_comments.text:
The garden is nice .Room is pretty small, not enough furniture to put facial cleaning ,make up stuff. Found small hair in bathroom after checking in.
The worst thing is no good quality rest. Full of paint smelling in the room ,no windows , only sliding doors. Waking up feeling dizzy! Completely no sound proof in the room at all . 7am already can hear all the noises from neighbours. Toilet is flushing slowly.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Calming views of the rice paddies and mountains. Located off the main road in town so it is a much calmer environment where you could go bike riding and visit the farms and cafes located more rural.
sample_comments.negatives: Definitely not what I expected - the hotel is a lot smaller and not as well kept as the pictures suggest. The buffet selection was limited with a lot of insects flying around the food, although you could order fresh cooked omelettes and pho noodle soup from the kitchen which was nice.The bikes are not free to rent and not in the greatest condition - you could rent a bike in much better condition for the same price at one of the many bike rental shops along the main road. The swimming pool was indeed green and we saw no one use it in the time we were there. Additionally, their online security appears to be an issue as my information used for my stay was used by a scammer who sent me a message on whatsapp asking for my credit card details to "secure my reservation". It was a very believable text, however, when I emailed the property about it they confirmed they did not send such a message and that it was a scam.

sample_comments.title: Relax
sample_comments.text: Everything fine but away from town. View is good .Rent bye cheap

sample_comments.title: Beautiful from the outside not great from the inside.
sample_comments.positives: The place is very beautiful and the sweet girl at the front desk was very helpful.
sample_comments.negatives:
Our room was really weird with a lot of not needed furniture and without a place to put our belongings without it filling the room. 
You can hear everything from outside the room and the windows go to view with trash around.
The shower is huge but the water goes everywhere to the point you cannot go to the toilet after someone showered and not wet your feet or shoes.

sample_comments.title: Very beautiful location, lacking good management
sample_comments.text:
Interesting stay. Beautiful premises and scenery, but dysfunctional building design and lacking good management. Very good breakfast, but poorly designed bathroom. Gorgeous balcony and nice decor, but unmaintained pool and no refrigerator (to credit staff, they bought a new mini-fridge for our room when we mentioned this).

Staff spoke not a word of English, relying on Google translate to communicate with us. The staff seem to try to accommodate us and assist, but lack training and have poor management skill.

Overall would I recommend this place? Yes, because the location was stunning, price was reasonable, breakfast was good, and we had a very comfortable bed.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Good location 10 minutes' walk from the hustle and bustle of the Tam Coc main street. Spacious room. Friendly staff.
sample_comments.negatives: The value for money wasn't amazing, as the place feels much less "premium" in reality than the photos and the price suggest. Our room wasn't particularly comfortable as it didn't have basic items of convenience like a chair to sit in comfortably, or any lamps to provide softer light at night time - which was disappointing for a place with quite a high price compared to other options in the area.

sample_comments.title: People are nice but not worth it
sample_comments.text: They tried to do it in a retreat style but not the fancy good one and the price is not matching the facilities. Hence, regretfully it is a no from me.

sample_comments.title: Comfortable stay!
sample_comments.positives: Lovely room, we had the quadruple which was fab with our daughter. Beautiful Mountain View, and we loved having the pool
sample_comments.negatives: It was a good 15 min walk into town and just too hot, so we ended up getting taxis into town all the time

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text:
The hotel has an amazing location, a few minutes from the busy center, being in the middle of the nature and rice fields. Our room had a beautiful rice view as well.

The negatives are that the room at some parts were very dusty, the balcony and some surfaces in the room too. We also found the charging outlets lacking (found only 2 in the whole room, far away from the bed), the breakfast is skippable.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The staff is very helpful - the property is clean and in central location

sample_comments.title: Cozy place at Tam Coc
sample_comments.text: Nice view from my room although the room is quite small. The staffs are very welcoming and supportive. Cozy place for couple or solo travelling.

sample_comments.title: A nice stay
sample_comments.positives: We stayed for one night and really enjoyed it. The villa was full of plants and nice design. The room was spacious with a comfortable bed and clean bathroom.

sample_comments.title: Quiet location
sample_comments.text: We enjoyed our stay. Our room overlooking the rice fields and mountains was quite small one side of the bed is up agains against a wall so doesn't have a side table. The person on that side has to climb down the bed to get out. The breakfast was great and the staff very attentive. Costs about 33000vdn via grab to town.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel with amazing views!
sample_comments.positives: Ailee Villa and Hotel is a newer property which is part of the reason why we were drawn to booking our stay here. We read the nice reviews about the quality and beauty of the hotel, and how nice the family that runs it is. We were happy with our stay here and can confirm that the hotel is beautiful and the family is very nice! There were a few quirks we noticed to the room/property/service but I attribute this to being newer and still figuring out the best ways to operate. The views from the property are super gorgeous, I highly recommend booking one of the rooms on the back side of the hotel with a balcony for the outstanding views. We enjoyed sitting on the balcony and zooming in on the mountain with our phones to see the goats climbing it. The location is great, just on the outskirts of the main area of Tam Coc. It is easy to walk to town but even easier if you have a scooter or bike, which they provide both for rent. Definitely recommend renting a scooter for longer day trips to Trang An, etc. I liked being on the outskirts of Tam Coc because it was so quiet and peaceful at night, but easy to go into town for food and supplies. I also loved biking and scootering around the ricefields near the hotel. The breakfast was also nice, although most people want more Western options in these reviews. I'm the opposite, I would have loved to see more Asian/Vietnamese options because the food is so good and we are in Vietnam after all :) Every employee was very friendly, but there was one person that stood out the most to me. I can't remember her name unfortunately, but she was one of the only staff members that could speak excellent English. She was sooo friendly and welcoming, and super helpful. She is very organized and on top of it too! I hope she is being treated and paid well there :) Overall, we really enjoyed our stay and hope that Ailee continues to be successful as they navigate their first years in business.

sample_comments.title: Good value for the price
sample_comments.text: Pleasant stay at this hotel! Love the design and details put into this place. Breakfast was decent. No complaints. Some bugs but as expected due to the location and layout. Staff were super friendly!!

sample_comments.title: Great stay
sample_comments.positives: Amazing breakfast, good location, and nice views. It was a very comfortable stay. We really appreciated how the hotel arranged a driver to take us around Ninh Binh.

sample_comments.title: 2 Nights in Tam Coc
sample_comments.text: Lovely place to station yourself to explore Tam Coc. The hotel is not far from the main road where there are loads of eateries and convenience stores. This is a no frills place - breakfast was simple but enough, beds/rooms were simple but clean. Bicycles were 50,000 vnd a day which were useful, we got around on them comfortably.

sample_comments.title: Good. Will book again when comeback Ninh Binh
sample_comments.positives: Very clean and comfortable. The environment is very quite and fresh
sample_comments.negatives: Breakfast

sample_comments.title: Perfect spot for quick stay
sample_comments.text: Price reasonable come with hotel breakfast and simple clean room layout with a bathtub.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: I saw some mixed reviews about this location, however I thought it was truly amazing. They were making some renovations and upgraded my room. The staff was absolutely amazing and easy to reach out to. They also have bikes for you to ride around the town which is a must do.

sample_comments.title: Nice place in a cozy location
sample_comments.text:
Cute little hotel a bit outside of town but they offer pick up service (text them) and they have a nice selection of breakfast (more western style) that changes every day, mixed with some local food. 

Sadly the rooms are a bit noisy but other then that absolutely recommend

sample_comments.title: We'll be back for sure!
sample_comments.positives: We loved absolutely everything about the hotel! Breakfast buffet was a treat. Staff is super friendly and supportive.

sample_comments.title: Overall stay was good
sample_comments.text: Staffs were helpful, overall stay was good...

sample_comments.title: Absolutely an amazing trip and stay at this hotel! I fell in love and will want to return everytime I come back to Vietn
sample_comments.positives: Everything was perfect!

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: So happy to stay in this hotel,the staf so helpfull dan location sooo beautifully

sample_comments.title: Exceptional Staff & Memorable Experience
sample_comments.positives:
This was such a lovely, peaceful stay! My room
Had the view of the rice paddies and a really comfortable king sized bed. The spa tub was an added bonus and nice hot shower. The staff went above and beyond to celebrate my birthday. They surprised me at breakfast with a cake and sang happy birthday to me. It was so incredibly special and unexpected. They also provided a steamer for me so I could steam my dress for a photoshoot. Exceptional experience. 8 minute walk to many cafes and restaurants.

sample_comments.title: Nice place
sample_comments.text:
It is a nice hotel. The staff are helpful. Location is good, surrounded by rice fields but still close to the town center. Yet, it's not really possible to see the view from within the hotel unless you get one of the rooms with a view. We found that the inner rooms got noisy with staff and other guests roaming around in front of the rooms early in the morning. 

Other than the lady who welcomed us, it was a bit of a challenge to communicate with the staff. They were sweet and helpful. 

Overall, the place didn't meet our expectations.

sample_comments.title: Thank you for accomodating our visit at Ninh Binh. Very cute little dog
sample_comments.positives: Love everything about this vilal! Good location near the city center
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing!

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel
sample_comments.text: Really lovely hotel. Clean, comfy room. Staff are friendly and helpful. Away from the busyness of the town but still walkable and ca also hire bikes which is great for getting around

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful place! One of my favorite stays on our trip!

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Very clean room, friendly staff and delicious breakfast food!!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: It was an amazing stay! I really loved it there especially the room I got with the bathtub on the balcony - highlight of my stay. Also the staff were all super helpful with all of my needs and with evening helping me organize transportation and activities in this beautiful city. I also slept like a baby! The surrounding area and view is out of this world beautiful. This is the perfect getaway from a city with cars and lots of noise. The room was cozy and an absolute gem . I would definitely stay there again if I'm back in town.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing. Absolutely amazing thank you to each and everyone of the staff for making me feel welcomed and at ease. It was the perfect getaway for me filled with peace and quiet - which is exactly what I was looking for.

sample_comments.title: Revier
sample_comments.text: Amazing hotel and very friendly staff

sample_comments.title: Loved our stay here. We would rebook this place in a heartbeat if we visit Ninh Binh again and would personally recommen
sample_comments.positives: The property is very pretty it's clean and well decorated. The staff are incredibly nice and accommodating. They are very helpful and would gladly book us with reliable drivers for our DIY trips to Hoang Mua Cave and Trang An :) you can also rent the hotel's bikes which we used to visit Bich Dong Pagoda All in all we would stay here again in a heartbeat
sample_comments.negatives: We booked the Quadruple Room with Mountain View and the room is really spacious and clean! If we had to nitpick what we didn't like it would only be the room's lack of mirrors haha! The room only had one room in the sink area and had non in the bathroom but we survived the place is also a bit far from the main road but not too long of a bike ride away to find a place to eat and shop for trinkets

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text:
Lovely place, the staffs were very friendly and the view is amazing. It is also near Tam Cốc which has alot of dining options, but quite far from the city center.
Breakfast options are simple, but still quite good.
Only complaint is that the room gets quite hot without air conditioning, so if you leave and come back during the day, you'll have to bear the heat for around 15 min until the AC can fully cool the room.
Otherwise this place is great value for the price

sample_comments.title: Wonderful experience
sample_comments.positives: Absolutely stunning location! I really appreciated the opportunity to use the bicycles and explore the area - it made the stay even more memorable. The room had a beautiful view, and the resort itself is new and stylish, with a very pleasant interior design. A special mention goes to the breakfasts - delicious and varied every day. The staff were attentive and genuinely helpful throughout the stay. Thank you for a wonderful experience!
sample_comments.negatives: The room is kind of small, but ok.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: The accommodation is clean and worth the money, with attentive and friendly staff. The service is very good, everyone should come to experience it. It includes a delicious breakfast with many dishes. Our family arrived 2 hours early and the home still allowed us to check in early. The home was very helpful, thank you so much!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: We loved our stay here!! Short walking distance to town, at night can see fireflies in the marshes!! Beautiful area to walk around from the hotel. Also offered 1/2 day scooter rentals which was very convenient.

sample_comments.title: Amazing property
sample_comments.text: This property was really aesthetic and located in a bit offbeat secluded area. It's gorgeous, it's picture friendly, staff is really helpful. The food is alright, not much options at in-house restaurant. But everything is located within 10 mins bike ride. The only thing that concerned me a bit was that there's a big graveyard on the way to the property- the road is secluded. Rest everything really great

sample_comments.title: Beautiful & Quiet Hotel Just Outside of Tam Coc (Ninh Binh)
sample_comments.positives: Ailee is a very new hotel and I was impressed with the system and accommodations they have. Any requests were attended to immediately and staff were eager for feedback as I think they want to ensure they are meeting guest's expectations. I personally loved staying outside of Tam Coc, which is generally very busy. The hotel is a very easy and safe 10-minute walk from town, which provides a more calm and quiet atmosphere. They have bicycles available to rent for $2USD a day, which you can use to explore the area. The staff also helped us get a taxi to a town slightly further away that we wanted to explore. The views from the back balcony are great! While the pool was quite chilly, it was still refreshing and offered a relaxing place to rest. Breakfast was delicious and offered a variety of Vietnamese, US, and UK options, with eggs made to order. Highly recommend - it was great for us traveling as a couple in a big group of friends with three children under the age of 4. We felt safe walking with them into town in their strollers.

sample_comments.title: Good bang for your bucks.
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is located near Tam Coc, in a convenient area, with motorbikes available for rent at a reasonable price. Breakfast was decent---complete and clean. The facilities are excellent, though there is a swimming pool, I didn't go in because it didn't look very clean. But that's okay, the pool seems more like an optional feature and doesn't affect the overall experience. The rooms are clean, the space is nice, and there are a lot of lights---don't hesitate to try them all out.

Lastly, the staff and the owner were very welcoming, friendly, and cheerful. They even offered us lychee fruit. Renting a motorbike was easy, and they kindly helped me store some items in the freezer. Overall, it was a great experience and definitely worth the money.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful hotel with lovely decor. The staff are the most friendly and helpful. Room is beautiful and clean. The bed is super comfy. The shower is one of the best we've had at any hotel room. Breakfast is also delicious. It has everything we needed to be comfortable.

sample_comments.title: Great surroundings and great room
sample_comments.text: It's a cute room with nice views, not too far from the center, you can walk there to the restaurant. Room is new but the draining in the shower was too slow but all the staff where nice

sample_comments.title: Experiencia un poco decepcionante
sample_comments.positives: El trato del personal fue muy bueno, eran atentos y ayudaban en todo lo que podían. El diseño de la piscina es bonito. La ubicación no está nada mal.
sample_comments.negatives: Nos alojamos en dos tipos diferentes de habitaciones, en la primera relación calidad precio no estaba mal, pero por la otra habitación (vistas a la montaña) no se correspondían el precio con la calidad, siendo un precio muy elevado para el tipo de habitación que nos tocó. En cuanto a la limpieza, es de los lugares de Vietnam donde más brilló por su ausencia dicha limpieza.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Very comfy bed, wonderful shower and bath, and breakfast was delightful. Location was only ok mostly because of the significant amount of construction in the area. Views are ok for the area but we rented bikes from the hotel and had a wonderful time in Ninh Binh/Tam Coc

sample_comments.title: Estancia en Ailee Hotel.
sample_comments.positives: El diseño del hotel es moderno y nuevo en su conjunto. Las habitaciones son amplias, el desayuno está bien y el personal intenta ser amable, aunque la comunicación es muy básica porque no saben inglés.
sample_comments.negatives:
Para ser un complejo nuevo, no está todo lo cuidado que se espera. La habitación estaba relativamente limpia, pero no todas las instalaciones (como la piscina del hotel, por ejemplo). 
Las imágenes con la que describen el alojamiento hacen que tus expectativas sean altas, expectativas que después no se cumplen.

sample_comments.title: Very good hotel
sample_comments.text: Hotel locations is good 10 minutes from Centre , staff is very friendly , area around is fully green , no kids play area , breakfast is very simple not too much items but totally good.hotel clean pool is open and highly to recommend rooms in back view it's amazing rooms

sample_comments.title: Muy buena
sample_comments.positives: La atención que recibimos por parte de la chica de recepción fue increíble, siempre con una sonrisa, nos ayudó con todo. La piscina es maravillosa, el servicio de masajes y las camas son súper cómodas.
sample_comments.negatives: El desayuno un poco sin más, normal, poca opción sin gluten

sample_comments.title: Lugar más alejado
sample_comments.text: Positive: The staff was very friendly, helpful, and attentive; the hotel was very nice; the rooms were lovely and spacious, very clean; and the breakfast was varied and delicious. Negative, in my opinion: It's far from the neighborhood; if you forgot to bring food, there's nowhere to buy it, unless you walk 10 minutes to the neighborhood. The rooms are located in front of the pool, where you won't be able to relax because guests use it disrespectfully, shouting or talking loudly. The rooms have terraces where you can also hear those who want to be in the pool sharing.

sample_comments.title: Volvería 100%
sample_comments.positives: El alojamiento es precioso. El desayuno increíble. Y todo el personal del hotel es maravilloso, te hacen la estancia cómoda y muy confortable. Cabe destacar el trato de Anh y Tuh, siempre pendientes a echarnos una mano.
sample_comments.negatives: Por poner alguna pega, las habitaciones pegadas a la piscina tienen un poco de luz y al estar en el pasillo de la entrada son un poco ruidosas.

sample_comments.title: Stay of 3 nights
sample_comments.text: I recommend staying in Ailee Villa in area of Tam Coc. What's important to know it's that around 8 min walk from the Main Street, but they offer rental of motorbike and regular bikes in good prices. The breakfasts were good, not much choice but always found something. In the bathroom the shower was leaking, but it wasn't a grand problem as there's also bathtub. The stuff is extremely nice and they try to make your stay as good as possible. The views from 2nd floor terrace are really beautiful. Nearby there's also a professional laundry service that took very good care of shoes dirty in mud. In general we recommend staying there

sample_comments.title: Todo bien
sample_comments.positives: La localización y la habitación en general.

sample_comments.title: Memorable stay
sample_comments.text: We spent two nights in ailee and we really enjoyed our stay. I love our room and rhe surroundings outside!
sample_comments.room_type: Balcony Bathtub Mountain View King Room

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Todo, la atención del personal sobretodo. La piscina muy chula y la bañera en la terraza.
sample_comments.negatives: Unas pocas hormigas en el baño.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: One of the best balcony view of Vietnam. Also the breakfast was some of the best food I had in Ninh Binh. They offer reasonably priced bicycle rentals and scooter rentals. Highly recommend!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Hotel muy bonito a las afueras de Tam Coc. Personal muy atento, el mejor desayuno bufet de todo el viaje. Habitaciones con baños grandes, buena limpieza y buena piscina. Alquilan motos a buen precio.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: This place is a very nice place to stay. It is situated a 10 minute walk from the Main Street which makes it nice and quiet. The staff are fantastic and more than happy to help any request. The breakfast provided in the morning was great. When we checked out they offered to hold our bags while we were out for the day exploring and also gave us the opportunity to wash when we got back before we headed off to our next destination.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Lugar precioso con un personal maravilloso. Nuestra estancia fue excelente. Repetiremos!

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Stay
sample_comments.text:
Value for money!
Love the wood exterior and interior making everything feel modern yet close to nature.

It's less walking distance to main town, but it definitely is cycling distance. However, it is easy to get to places from here, and tours will pick u up from this location.

Oh, u must do the body massage! They have highly skilled masseurs and they get to knots that nobody has touched before. Better than anyone in Hanoi. (I've done 4x massage in 6 days and this place has the best)

sample_comments.title: perfecto
sample_comments.positives: todo limpio, el personal encantador, un paraíso

sample_comments.title: Nice with superb views
sample_comments.text: Nice, clean and comfy little hotel with helpful staff. Take the balcony view is worth the money.

sample_comments.title: Un trocito de paraíso
sample_comments.positives:
El hotel está nuevo, todo cuidado al detalle y con una decoración preciosa que se mimetiza con el increíble entorno en el que está situado.
La habitación es amplia, con un patio precioso y, en nuestro caso, una alucinante bañera para poder relajarte mientras contemplas sus magníficas vistas. La cama y almohadas son muy cómodas.
La piscina es una pasada!
El personal es maravilloso, amable y servicial. Soy celíaca, lo comenté nada más llegar y se ofrecieron para hacerme el desayuno que yo quisiera.
Tiene servicio de alquiler de bicicletas súper barato, viene genial para llegar al centro del pueblo en menos de cinco minutos (andando son 15).

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel
sample_comments.text: Everything is nice in hotel , just a little far from restaurant. But you can walk about 15-20mins

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Super amables, el de recepción es un santo. Hotel super bonito. Piscina buenísima. Laundry disponible.
sample_comments.negatives: Nada negativo.

sample_comments.title: 2 night stay
sample_comments.text: Beautiful hotel, staff are extremely friendly and will go above and beyond to make sure you're happy. We would have loved to have stayed longer!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Todo estupendo, repetiría

sample_comments.title: Amazing stay in Tam Coc!
sample_comments.text: This hotel was one of the best we stayed in on our trip throughout Vietnam. The room was stunning and the staff were so so helpful particularly the man at the check in desk. Would definitely recommend for those looking for luxury in the middle of nature and only a 2 minute cycle from the heart of tam coc.

sample_comments.title: Perfecto
sample_comments.positives: Todo! El hotel precioso, una vista maravillosa... el personal que nos atendió muy amables. Tenían moto para arrendar que lo súper recomiendo para moverse porque los atractivos son lejos.

sample_comments.title: Nice Stay
sample_comments.text: The Hotel has been renovated recently and is really nice. However, the pool did not look the cleanest, other than that our stay was good.

sample_comments.title: Hôtel magnifique mais trop de dysfonctionnements
sample_comments.positives:
Nous sommes très mitigés sur notre séjour. Nous y avons séjourné 3 nuits avec notre fils de 3 ans. 
L'hôtel est très beau, très design, très « instagrammable ». Nous avions une chambre pour 4, avec terrasse et baignoire vue sur les rizières. La chambre et salle de bain sont spacieuses. Le prêt de vélo est très pratique pour aller en ville avec siège enfant (3 min des restaurants). Le petit déjeuné est plutôt bon (surtout leur sandwich). Le personnel est très gentil, mais ne parle pas très bien anglais donc parfois difficile à se faire comprendre.
sample_comments.negatives:
Même si l'hôtel est magnifique et récent, malheureusement il a beaucoup de dysfonctionnement :
- pas d'eau chaude un soir
- pas d'eau froide le soir suivant (le personnel doit « pomper » vers la piscine pour faire venir de l'eau froide jusqu'à notre chambre... qui n'est finalement jamais venue). 
- le frigo était tellement froid (problème de réglage) qu'une canette de bière à exploser en pleine nuit 
- des fourmis dans le lit : notre fils s'est bien fait piqué
- de nombreuses coupures d'électricité qui coupèrent également la climatisation (le personnel ne savait pas d'où cela pouvait venir car il y avait toujours de l'électricité dans les parties communes) 
- l'eau de la piscine est trouble et pas super propre, avec une mauvaise odeur
- le personnel ne nous a pas aidé à porter les bagages lors de notre arrivée et notre départ, et nous a à peine accueilli 
- les autres clients, d'origine vietnamienne, faisaient énormément de bruit jusqu'à tard le soir (des portes qui claquaient, des enfants qui faisaient beaucoup de bruit jusqu'à tard dans la piscine, un groupe qui se sont mis dehors en bas de la terrasse avec la musique à fond...) 
- prix jugé donc beaucoup trop élevé compte tenu de tous ces dysfonctionnements

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: Ailee has just opened, so everything is very new and clean, and the staff and hosts are friendly. The actual experience of the accommodation is much more beautiful than in the photos. The only drawback is that the room needs to improve the hot and cold water system. Ailee still deserves a 10/10!

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: L'emplacement est top
sample_comments.negatives:
Les vélos sont obsolètes et unsecured, les freins ne marchent pas, les roues dégonflées. 
Intimité 0
Mauvaise isolation 
Chambres trop collées les unes aux autres 
Les massages ne valent pas le coup du tout 
Piscine sale et personne s'y baigne

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The clean room is available for those who want to chill. You can give it a try.

sample_comments.title: Insta vs réalité
sample_comments.positives: L'hôtel est décoré avec goût et les chambres sont plutôt jolies, nous avons eu la chance d'avoir une chambre avec une belle vue sur le jardin. À quelques minutes du centre de Tam Coc.
sample_comments.negatives:
L'hôtel est beaucoup plus petit qu'il n'en a l'air sur les photos. Le sol de la chambre était sale et plusieurs fourmies se baladaient. La douche est mal équipée, le pommeau de douche ou encore les carreaux étaient vétustes et sales. Cheveux et insectes étaient présents dans la baignoire.
Le personnel n'est pas méchant et est très souriant, mais s'ils n'avaient pas été là cela aurait été pareil. D'ailleurs à notre arrivée personne n'était là pour le check in, nous avons du attendre 15min pour une personne qui ne parlait pas anglais et ne nous a donné aucune instruction. Aucune information également sur le restaurant, ayant cru qu'il y avait un restaurant, nous demandons le soir si nous pouvons manger ici, on nous répond que oui, puis nous avons attendu 30min sans que personne s'occupe de nous (le personnel était plutôt sur tiktok). Nous avons alors compris qu'il n'y avait pas de restaurant, et avons donc pris un vélo pour se rendre au centre. Quelle fut notre surprise le lendemain au check out lorsque nous nous rendons compte que le vélo était payant, alors qu'aucun hôtel ne charge le vélo dans la région et alentours.

Bref, c'est un hôtel ok, mais qui ne vaut pas autant de commentaires positifs.

sample_comments.title: Nice little hotel
sample_comments.text: The hotel is little and charming. There was some renovation when we stayed but they upgrade us to a very nice room with bath on the balcony. They gave you free bicycle to go around and it was very pleasant, thank you!

sample_comments.title: Un petit cocon face aux pics carstiques!
sample_comments.positives:
La proximité avec le centre de tam coc tout en étant loin du vacarme!
Le centre est à 7 min à pieds et de jour comme de nuit totalement safe .
Un prêt de vélo est disponible ainsi qu'un service de blanchisserie. Le petit déjeuner est très bon. Les chambres avec vue sont sublimes!
sample_comments.negatives: L'hôtel est récent, mais il y aurait quelques amélioration à faire, notamment un tapis de bain car la douche est avec les toilettes et il n'y a pas de séparation.

sample_comments.title: Quiet retreat with awesome views
sample_comments.text: Value for money, great views from balcony. Generally clean, requires a short walk to main street if you don't always grab. They serve breakfast and have bikes for rent.
sample_comments.room_type: Balcony Bathtub Mountain View King Room

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Tres propre, très joli, service de laundry disponible
sample_comments.negatives: Je trouve le prix trop élevé, la localisation fait que l'hôtel est très isolé même s'il est proche du centre. Il faudra parfois un peu de patience pour trouver un Grab (impossible de faire le trajet à pieds de nuit)

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Place to Stay
sample_comments.text: We had a pleasant stay here. The place is clean, quiet, and well maintained, making it comfortable for families. The host was very friendly and helpful, always willing to assist when needed. Overall, a nice place to stay in Tam Coc and good value for the experience.

sample_comments.title: Malheureusement la pluie ne nous a pas permis de profiter de la piscine mais le personnel est adorable
sample_comments.positives: Bel hôtel . Très jolie piscine et surtout un accueil merveilleux

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Địa điểm gần chỗ đi thuyền Tam Cốc rất tiện lợi. Trong các khách sạn view thiên nhiên thì mình thấy chỗ này phòng ốc mới, view đẹp, riêng tư và thiết kế đẹp nha. Đồ ăn sáng ko đa dạng lắm nhưng ngon nè. Nói chung rất hài lòng.

sample_comments.title: Bel hôtel, parfait pour y séjourner lorsqu'il fait beau.
sample_comments.positives: Personnel gentil, belle piscine, l'hôtel est parfait quand il fait beau et chaud.
sample_comments.negatives: Nous avons moins apprécié la salle de bain et nous avons eu froid.

sample_comments.title: Cosy and relexing hotel
sample_comments.text:
A bit inside from main street, but easy to access just 7~10min walk
Friendly staffs, and srounded by nature, very relaxing place.

Soundproof a bit eeak, but with this value no complain

sample_comments.title: Agréable séjour !
sample_comments.positives: Hotel récent et agréable dans l'ensemble ! Belle chambre spacieuse avec décoration soignée ! Le personnel était très gentil, serviable et aidant. La piscine est ombragée. Bon petit déjeuner.
sample_comments.negatives:
L'hôtel semble récent et doit encore se mettre en place. 
Massage : l'espace dédié était en désordre complet et accessible par d'autres personnes pendant un soin.
Fourmi : gros problème de fourmis dans la chambre où nous étions.
Rapport qualité prix un peu trop élevé à l'heure actuelle.

sample_comments.title: Stylish boutique hotel - totally recommend
sample_comments.text:
A beautiful hotel with lots of attention to detail. My double room was modern, clean, and decorated with quality wooden furniture and terrazzo floor. Daily housekeeping and a great included breakfast --- especially the fresh omelettes and Vietnamese coffee.

The location is ideal: just outside the center, quiet and peaceful, but still an easy walk or bike ride into town. The small pool and overall design give it a boutique, mini-resort feel rather than a simple homestay.

Only minor downside: the walls are a bit thin --- but it was always quiet at night.

Perfect for anyone who appreciates good interior design and comfort without paying luxury prices. I felt really at home here.

sample_comments.title: Très bon logement mais...
sample_comments.positives:
Très bel hôtel
Très belle chambre
Belle deco
Bon petit dej
Belle piscine
Emplacement bon au calme
sample_comments.negatives:
Rapport qualité prix peut-être un peu élevé 
Personnel manque un peu d' attention et de professionnalisme 
L hôtel étant récent, cela peut s expliquer

sample_comments.title: A slice of heaven!
sample_comments.text:
We had a most wonderful 2 night stay at Ailee Villa this week. The villa is situated in a stunning village, surrounded by rice paddies and dotted by beautiful limestone karts. A truly peaceful and idyllic setting to simply relax in the lap of nature. This family-run resort is fairly new and is beautifully designed to suit the rustic setting. The staff went out of the way to see to all our needs, always with a
warmth and kindness. A special thanks to the lovely Ms Thu who is such an angel!

I'll definitely return to this resort the next time I'm back in Tam Coc.

sample_comments.title: Aesthetic hotel close to Tam Coc Ninh Binh
sample_comments.positives:
Très joli hôtel, avec une ambiance/déco à la Bali, à 12 mins à pied du centre. 
Le personnel est ultra serviable et gentil. Le petit déjeuner (=buffet) est une tuerie ! 

Petit bémol : la piscine n'était pas fonctionnelle car n'était pas entretenue par manque de connaissances mais nous avons donné des conseils au propriétaire, qui à la suite, était en train de faire le nécessaire pour le traitement au cours de notre séjour.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful and comfortable accommodation.
sample_comments.text: A charming and cozy boutique homestay. The atmosphere was relaxing and comfortable, and the staff were very friendly. Although the place is small, it's beautifully designed and quite satisfying. The soundproofing could be improved, but with earplugs it wasn't a problem. I would definitely love to stay here again.

sample_comments.title: Hôtel récent
sample_comments.positives: Cet hôtel est récent, et donc évolue avec le temps et sans doute avec les remarques des clients. Il manque peut être des porte manteaux dans la chambre (salle de bains) le déjeuner pourrait être à peine plus varié en sucré. La piscine n'est pas très propre. En revanche le cadre est top.

sample_comments.title: Great value for money, very peaceful.
sample_comments.text:
Pros:
- Clean and beautifully decorated rooms.
- Lovely peaceful location with stunning views.
- Amazing breakfast especially pho.
- Great sizeable pool for cooling off.
- 10 mins bike ride from centre of Tam Coc.
- staff help you order food from town if you're staying in.
- Nice place to switch off and relax. 

Cons: 
- A little far out of town, but they offer bike hire for 50,000 VND a day.
- No restaurant on site but you can order food to site. 
- Uncomfortable wooden bath in the deluxe double.

sample_comments.title: Malgré les petits inconvénients je vous recommande cet hébergement
sample_comments.positives: C'est vraiment un bel hébergement. Il est bien situé, un peu à l'écart de la ville pour avoir la tranquillité mais assez proche pour pouvoir y aller à pied avec les enfants. Les déjeuners étaient très garnis avec beaucoup de choix. Le personnel nous a offert de la nourriture pour apporter lors de notre départ puisque nous quittions très tôt le matin.
sample_comments.negatives: Lors de la réservation nous avions convenu d'une chambre au deuxième étage. À notre arrivée, ils nous ont offert une chambre au premier étage. Nous avons argumenté beaucoup pour se faire comprendre et avoir la chambre tel qu'il avait été convenu. Le personnel a été très compréhensif et nous a déménagé après une nuit. De plus, la salle de bain dans la chambre au premier étage où nous étions avec une mauvaise odeur en permanence.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Beautiful villa, nicely set up rooms, spacious rooms, location near Tam Coc and Trang An boat dock. Delicious breakfast with many options. However, the sink is a bit small.

sample_comments.title: Au cœur de la baie d'Halong terrestre
sample_comments.positives:
Le charme de l'endroit, des paysages karstiques tout autour, la sérénités du lieu, le décor. Nous étions vraiment dans le cœur de la baie d'Halong terrestre au cœur même des rochers qui surplombaient les lacs d'eau turquoise, le personnel à l'écoute et la proximité à pied ou à vélo des principales activités. Aussi, le lang's salad pas très loin à pied environ 15 min (au top pour des brunch ou lunch en famille)

Service de laundry au top.
sample_comments.negatives: Le petit déjeuner était ok mais peut encore être amélioré.

sample_comments.title: Room is nice, clean, and the owner is friendly.
sample_comments.text: The room is just like in the picture, clean and spacious. The location is very close to Tam Coc. The staff is very helpful. Very satisfied, would consider returning.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
Nous avons apprécié notre séjour chez Ailee villa. Notre chambre donnait sur la cour principale avec la piscine et l'endroit était très calme.
L'hôtel est idéalement situé si vous souhaitez être au calme et en dehors du centre.

sample_comments.title: Perfect
sample_comments.text: everything was perfect... nothing and there's no need to say more

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
Personnel agréable et disponible se montrant attentif à nos besoins.
Établissement récent avec une architecture moderne et de beaux matériaux qui rendent l'endroit très cozy.
Petit-déjeuner frais et varié.
Hôtel excentré donc calme, à peine loin du centre (10min à pied).

sample_comments.title: Amazing
sample_comments.text: Staff and room was amazing !

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
Très bel hôtel et très belle chambre ! 
Pour information toutes les chambres ne disposent pas de la baignoire sur la terrasse comment peuvent le montrer les photos. 
L'hôtel est à 5mn en vélo du centre ville.
sample_comments.negatives: Pas beaucoup de place pour prendre le petit déjeuner le matin j'ai dû revenir plus tard pour avoir une table et le buffet était quasiment vide

sample_comments.title: Great preaceful stay
sample_comments.text: The location quite challenging when arriving at night (because we use the bus). But other than that, the rest was great. Love the peaceful environment near the rice fields, which is great for light walk.

sample_comments.title: Magnifique hôtel au calme
sample_comments.positives: L'hôtel est très bien placé pour aller explorer la campagne de Tam Coc en vélo. Le personnel était très attentif et agréable avec nous. Ils nous ont trouvé un vélo pour enfant en nous des vélos adultes qu'ils proposent à la location. La chambre est grande et bien équipée. La terrasse et le petit jardin individuel privé avec vue sur la montagne sont extraordinaires! Le petit déjeuner était copieux et bon. Vous reviendrons sans hésitation !

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: We are a total of 4 people, and there was support for early check-in. The room was clean, and on the day we went, it was very cold; the air conditioner had a heating mode. The breakfast was decent, and there was a beautiful blooming purple flower tree in front of the hotel. The rental car was a bit old; I rented it in the evening but got one without headlights.

sample_comments.title: Charmant petit hôtel
sample_comments.positives:
La vue de notre chambre sur les rizières. 
Malheureusement pas eu le temps d'utiliser la baignoire de notre terrasse. 
Petit-déjeuner, il y a tout ce qu'il faut.
Très joli petit hôtel près du centre à pied.
sample_comments.negatives: Ras

sample_comments.title: Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời
sample_comments.text:
Mình đi 3 gia đình với 6 người lớn và 5 em bé, ở phòng family rất thoải mái. 
Bể bơi sạch, nước không hề bị mùi clo.
Nhân viên nhiệt tình.
Ăn sáng ngon, đầu bếp xịn xò, mặc dù nhỏ xinh nhưng đủ món. Các bé thích mê, chấm 5 sao 
Bác chủ siêu nhiệt tình, hiếu khách, rất chiều.
Khu nghỉ tiện lợi đi ra bến thuyền Tam Cốc

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Un petit hotel incroyable, personnel charmant. Super petit déjeuner, excellent rapport qualité prix. Nous avons adoré ce séjour. Merci

sample_comments.title: Very impressive!!!
sample_comments.text: Particularly satisfied with the staff here, enthusiastic and friendly. The space is beautiful, fresh, and the rooms are clean.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: L hôtel et le décor de l hôtel parfait.. La'laverie c était top.. Le personnels aux petits soins parfait aussi
sample_comments.negatives: Les travaux tôt le matin et le bruit le soir.. Les murs sont minces.. Dommage

sample_comments.title: No penalty points.
sample_comments.text: Initially upon arrival, I was strongly impressed by the interior design. It looks very luxurious and natural. The room is clean, and the receptionists and cleaning staff are friendly. I really like this place.

sample_comments.title: Incroyable !!!
sample_comments.positives: INCROYABLE !!'
sample_comments.negatives: La gentillesse de tout le personnel ! L'accueil, la beauté du logement, le confort, les attentions pour nos voyages de noces !! Le déjeuné était excellent. La piscine super! C'était un court séjour mais nous recommanderons l'établissement

sample_comments.title: Vị trí đẹp, tiện lợi.
sample_comments.text: Đối diện đồng và không xa chỗ khu phố Tây. Chỗ ở chill, đẹp và thoải mái. Giống như ở nhà. Thiết kế rất đẹp. CÓ cho thuê xe máy luôn.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: L'ambiance, la décoration, l'accueil, le personnel d'hôtel, les réactions face aux demandes, la vue ! Bravo

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The accommodation is clean, well-furnished, with a beautiful and airy view. The hosts are friendly and allowed us to check in early at 12 PM.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Le plus beau hôtel que j'ai fait au Vietnam. La chambre dispose d'une terrasse et d'un petit jardin avec une vue éblouissante! L'hôtel est bien situé et dispose d'une très belle piscine .

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Accommodation is right in the center of Tam Coc, convenient for moving around and dining. The room is clean, beautiful, and spacious. The view of the fields is worth the money, very suitable for relaxation and recovery.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Le personnel est extrêmement gentil et fait tout pour faire plaisir. Hôtel très joli.
sample_comments.negatives: Si vous voulez être au calme évitez les chambres faces à la piscine.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The accommodation is clean and spacious. The staff is enthusiastic. The rooms have a minimalist style, making them very suitable for relaxation and recovery. The view of the rice fields is worth the money because it is green, cool, and peaceful.

sample_comments.title: Top
sample_comments.positives:
Très bel hôtel, chambres très confortables et piscine ouverte à toute heure. 
Arrière calme avec superbe vue (chambre avec terrasse) 

Le personnel d'accueil est vraiment super sympa et très arrangeant, mention toute spéciale pour la fille à l'accueil : merci !

sample_comments.title: Holiday review
sample_comments.text: Friendly staff, clean accommodation, reasonably priced, beautifully modern style... However, a downside is the soundproofing between the rooms is quite poor, so improvements are needed for a better customer experience.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Super 
Vraiment excellent

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The accommodation is very beautiful, with a quiet space and plenty of greenery, creating an extremely relaxing atmosphere. The room is clean, fully equipped, and the staff is enthusiastic and friendly. It is very suitable for relaxation and "healing."

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Personnel adorable, aux petits soins. Très bel hôtel. Très belles chambres. Vue magnifique.

sample_comments.title: Loved Everything About This Place!
sample_comments.text:
We had such a lovely stay at Ailee Villa & Hotel Tam Coc! The place itself is beautiful and the location is perfect, close to everything in Tam Coc but still peaceful and relaxing.

The breakfast was absolutely amazing; fresh, delicious and a great way to start the day. What really made our stay special, though, was the staff. Everyone was incredibly kind, welcoming and always ready to help with a smile.

Highly recommend this place if you're visiting Tam Coc. We would definitely stay here again!

sample_comments.title: Très bien
sample_comments.positives:
Localisation en bordure de rizière mais à proximité de la ville. 8 Minutes à pieds 
Le personnel est très sympathique 
Le calme de l'établissement
sample_comments.negatives:
Le petit déjeuner . La taille de la chambre n'est pas conforme à ce qui est vendu. 
Il y avait des gravillons dans la chambre que nous avons choisi mais ce n'était vraiment pas pratique

sample_comments.title: Một địa điểm lưu trú thuận tiện, thân thiện và sạch sẽ
sample_comments.text:
Tôi đã lưu trú tại nhiều địa điểm tại Ninh Bình và đây tiếp tục là một lựa chọn đúng đắn. Khách sạn có vị trí thuận tiện cho việc di chuyển, kể cả bằng xe ô tô mặc dù có 1 đoạn đường sẽ hơi nhỏ để 2 ô tô tránh nhau nhưng lưu lượng xe ít nên khá thoải mái. Khách sạn ở gần khu trung tâm của Tam Cốc nên cũng tiện cho việc ăn uống. Khuôn viên khách sạn nhỏ nhưng có sự bố trí phù hợp nên tôi thấy thoải mái. Phía sau khách sạn là view ruộng nên khá thoáng đãng và đúng đặc trưng của Ninh Bình.
Lưu ý: có bể bơi nhưng tôi có cảm giác hơi sâu nên các gia đình có trẻ em cần đặc biệt để ý, trông chừng khi cho trẻ em tiếp cận bể bơi.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Nous avons passé deux nuits, au calme, dans cet hôtel récent à l'écart de la ville. Le personnel est adorable, prévenant. Les chambres sont confortables. Ils proposent location de vélos ou scooter. Vraiment super.

sample_comments.title: Rất ổn
sample_comments.text: Chị chủ thân thiện, khách sạn đầy đủ tiện nghi và sạch sẽ. Sẽ quay lại vào lần tới đến Ninh Bình

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Gute Lage
sample_comments.negatives:
Das Hotel ist insgesamt durchschnittlich und erfüllt grundlegende Erwartungen, hat aber einige klare Schwächen.

Die Zimmer sind sehr klein und leider extrem hellhörig, was den Aufenthalt deutlich weniger angenehm macht. Zudem gibt es kaum praktische Ausstattung: Am Bett fehlt eine Steckdose komplett und im gesamten Zimmer stehen nur zwei zur Verfügung - das ist einfach nicht zeitgemäß.

Das Frühstück war eher enttäuschend, sowohl in Auswahl als auch Qualität. Hier besteht definitiv Verbesserungsbedarf. Auch der Service wirkt noch nicht eingespielt und könnte deutlich aufmerksamer und professioneller sein.

Unterm Strich ein okayes Hotel für kurze Aufenthalte, aber mit spürbarem Verbesserungspotenzial.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
We had a lovely stay here. The room was spacious, modern, and very comfortable. The bed was big and clean, which made it easy to relax after a long day.

The staff were incredibly friendly. You can rent a scooter, do laundry, and we had one of the best massages in Vietnam here. Breakfast was good, and the chef was especially friendly in the morning. The lady at the front desk was lovely and always welcoming.

We checked out at 12, but our bus wasn't until the evening. They kindly allowed us to use the shower later and even let us use a scooter for the last hour so we could go out for dinner. When we left, they gave us a bottle of water each, which was a very sweet gesture.

Overall, it was a wonderful stay and we truly appreciated their kindness and hospitality.

sample_comments.title: Schöne Lage, Zimmer Ausstattung rudimentär, uninteressiertes Personal
sample_comments.positives: Lage, Ausblick
sample_comments.negatives: Unfreundliches Personal, Cantinenhaftes Frühstück

sample_comments.title: Great place, will be coming back
sample_comments.text: Great family run hotel, great location, scooter hire, massage service and great restaurant/bar facilities. Our grab cancelled at last minute and the staff took us on their scooters to make our bus just in time. All round great experience

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: Die Einrichtung und Idee vom Hotel in der Natur wurde gut umgesetzt und das Personal war nett.
sample_comments.negatives: Der Boden war dreckig als wir reingekommen sind, es lagen überall Haare rum. Das Hotel scheint ein Ameisenproblem zu haben. Möglicherweise ein Einzelfall, aber durch die vielen Kinder war es sehr laut.

sample_comments.title: I wish we had longer
sample_comments.text: This was probably our favourite hotel stay during our 2weeks in Vietnam. The decor was relaxed and it was hidden out enough from Tam Coc chaos to enjoy the mountainside setting. A short walk, bike or scooter into the town centre. Best shower we had our trip by far, if you've been to Vietnam you'll know what I mean. The staff were so kind and allowed us to leave our bags there after check out so we could explore. Breakfast in the morning was a decent spread too!

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.negatives: Wir hatten uns sehr auf diese Unterkunft gefreut, am Ende war sie aber leider überwiegend enttäuschend. Wir haben bewusst das Zimmer mit Aussicht nach hinten raus auf die Reisfelder gewählt. Die Aussicht war toll, das Zimmer an sich ist aber echt klein. Es gibt kaum Ablagemöglichkeiten, es war nicht überall sauber, und es muffte manchmal aus dem Bad. Frühstück geht nur bis 09 Uhr. Wir haben uns einen Roller über die Unterkunft gemietet. Der Zustand der Roller ist allerdings miserable. Beim ersten Roller funktionierte der Blinker und das Licht nicht richtig. Nachdem wir um einen anderen gebeten haben, haben wir einen mit kaputter Tank- und Tachoanzeige erhalten mit fast 100K Kilometern drauf. Leider haben wir nicht erneut um einen anderen Roller gebeten, am Ende sind wir liegen geblieben, weil der Roller scheinbar so viel Sprit schluckte und dann unerwartet leer war. Auch die Helme waren ein Witz. Für ein verhältnismäßig teureres Hotel ist das wirklich inakzeptabel solche Roller zu vermieten. Insgesamt stimmt Preis/ Leistung bei der Unterkunft nicht. Bis auf 1,2 Personen spricht auch niemand englisch. Die Bilder sind irreführend und alles ist bei weitem nicht so einladend und hochwertig. Der Pool ist dreckig und wird auch scheinbar nicht gereinigt. Wir würden hier nicht nochmal buchen!

sample_comments.title: Perfect
sample_comments.text: Great hotel run by a windeful staff in a beautiful location in the rice fields whilst still easy to walk or bike to the main road for all the restaurants. The staff really make the stay here special.

sample_comments.title: Tolles Design mit einem ABER
sample_comments.positives: Das Design des gesamten Hotels, inklusive der Zimmer (wir hatten eine Badewanne mit mega Blick auf dem Balkon) ist wunderschön und auch die Lage inmitten von Reisfeldern wirklich total grandios und entspannend, dafür könnte ich 10 Punkte geben! Die Mitarbeiter sind alle sehr freundlich, geben sich Mühe, aber es fehlt dem Hotel doch noch an Service und eingespielten Routinen.
sample_comments.negatives: Leider wurden die Räume nicht täglich gesäubert, wir waren 2 Nächte da und es gab keinen Roomservice, nichtmal Handtücher wurden getauscht, wir waren in 9 anderen Hotels in Vietnam und da hatten wir in jedem täglich eine Reinigung. Dementsprechend gab es auch kein täglichesTrinkwasser, was wir auch anders gewohnt waren. Frühstück startet später als angekündigt, sodass wir etwas warten mussten. Der Pool war dreckig und das Wasser war trüb, man konnte da definitiv nicht schwimmen - leider den Pool also trotz mega Wetter nicht genutzt, so erging es auch allen anderen Gästen. Zudem hatten wir Ameisen im Zimmer, was echt nicht so toll war. Also ja, das Hotel hat Potenzial, aber beim allgemeinen Service muss definitiv noch ordentlich was gemacht werden.

sample_comments.title: Excellent experience
sample_comments.text:
We stayed at the Mountain View room for two nights and we love it so much! The room design and decorations are very elegant and modern. The balcony with Mountain View is the best! The hot showers and bathtub are also satisfying! The staffs are welcoming and quick response. The hotel provides rental for scooters and bicycles so it's very convenient. The location is outside of the busy area (which is good) but You can walk ( ten mins) or ride bikes to the center of the town very easily. 
Overall highly recommended!

sample_comments.title: Gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis - eine tolle Base um Ninh Binh zu erkunden
sample_comments.positives: Gute Lage am Stadtrand von Tam Coc. Das Hotel selbst ist sehr schön gestaltet und lädt zum am Pool bleiben ein. Das Personal war sehr freundlich. Fahrräder konnten ausgeliehen werden und Wäscheservice war schnell und günstig.
sample_comments.negatives: Das warme Wasser war leider sehr unzuverlässig was bei den hohen Temperaturen nicht so schlimm war. Das Bad hatte keine Belüftung wordurch es sehr heiß wurde. Von Frühstück waren wir ein wenig enttäuscht, haben aber im Ort viele gute Alternativen gefunden

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Cozy little home stay . Great staffs

sample_comments.title: Sehr schönes Hotel in ruhiger Lage
sample_comments.positives: Sehr schön und modern, tolles Personal, gutes Frühstück, geräumiges Zimmer mit Badewanne und Dusche, Terasse mit Sitzecke vor dem Zimmer, Moped und Fahrradverleih
sample_comments.negatives: Manche Stellen waren nicht ganz so sauber, aber nicht weiter schlimm

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The room is beautiful, fully furnished, and has many photo spots. The staff is enthusiastic, and it's a place worth returning to next time.

sample_comments.title: Super
sample_comments.positives: Sehr schön
sample_comments.negatives: Haben nicht das gebuchte Zimmer erhalten.

sample_comments.title: Peaceful get away
sample_comments.text: Ailee Tam Coc has lovely views and very comfortable beds, making it a relaxing place to stay. The staff were kind and helpful, and it's just a short walk to the main road. The shower wasn't quite hot enough, but it was still okay. We especially loved having bikes available to get around --- such a great way to explore the area.

sample_comments.title: Nette Unterkunft nahe TamCoc
sample_comments.positives:
Schön gestaltetes Hotel in der Nähe von TamCoc. Wir fanden es sehr schön dass das Hotel leicht außerhalb liegt (ca. 15min zu Fuß nach TamCoc Zentrum). Sehr bemühtes und hilfsbereites Personal.
Da wir nur eine Nacht hier verbracht haben, können wir nicht mehr dazu sagen. Zum Frühstück durften wir uns auf den Weg etwas mitnehmen was wirklich sehr zuvorkommend war, da unser nächster Transfer schon früh am Morgen war.
sample_comments.negatives: Die Sauberkeit der Zimmer ist nicht so gut wie auf den Bildern. Den Geruch im Zimmer (vermutlich durch die Klimaanlage) haben wir als ein wenig störend empfunden. Insgesamt hat die Gestaltung und Einrichtung auf uns eher simpel gewirkt.

sample_comments.title: Very nice hotel
sample_comments.text: All clean, tasty breakfast, you could rent a bike and they could wash your laundry. Near the Main Street but far enough to sleep in quiet.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Nice view

sample_comments.title: Amazing Stay!
sample_comments.text: I went with my parents and siblings to this beautiful stay, everything was so sustainably built. They offered spa services, cab services and suggestions for tour. The staff was so nice and helpful. The area around the villa was just breathtaking! 10/10 recommend if you are looking for a cutesy stay. The people in Ninh Binh are just too nice for this world!

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Schöne Hotelanlage und das Personal ist sehr freundlich. Die Lage ist auch gut, da man etwas abseits vom Trubel ist, aber die Hauptstraße in Tam Coc mit den Restaurants und Bars gut zu Fuß erreichen kann. Insgesamt gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis.
sample_comments.negatives: Die Dusche wurde leider nicht warm genug.

sample_comments.title: Nice cozy stay
sample_comments.text: The place is pretty decent for this price. This villa is recently built. The host is nice & welcoming. Breakfast was good. Easy to get around. Definitely recommend to other people this place.
sample_comments.room_type: Balcony Bathtub Mountain View King Room

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Die Unterkunft ist sehr geschmackvoll eingerichtet und die Zimmer sowie der Blick sind fantastisch. Besonders die Badewanne auf der Terrasse war ein Highlight.
sample_comments.negatives: Das Frühstück war nur mittelmäßig

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: I love Ninh Binh for the first time I came to this city. And I really love my hotel Ailee. The staf was helpfull and kind, they even gave me some breakfast for my next trip to another city. The room was cozy and super clean, I recomend for you guys who want to visit Ninh Binh. I love the design because its beautiful in every detail of the building. And ofcourse the view was amazing, you can walk or rent a bike to see beautiful view around this hotel

sample_comments.title: Ruhiges stilvolles Landhotel.
sample_comments.positives: Kleines, gemütliches Hotel in ruhiger Stadtrandlage. Ländliche Umgebung, 10 Minuten zur Ortsmitte.
sample_comments.negatives: Frühstück könnte etwas reichhaltiger sein

sample_comments.title: Stunning hotel!
sample_comments.text: We absolutely loved our stay at this hotel. The design is beautiful and everything was super clean. The view from our balcony was so stunning and the bath was such a luxurious touch. We rented bikes directly from the hotel and really enjoyed cycling around, and the town is just a short walk away. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, even allowing us to use the bikes after we checked out. I would highly recommend this place for a romantic and relaxing stay.
sample_comments.room_type: Balcony Bathtub Mountain View King Room

sample_comments.title: Sehr zu empfehlen
sample_comments.positives:
Schöne Anlage
Gute Lage
Sehr nettes & hilfsbereites Personal
sample_comments.negatives: Nicht für kalte Temperaturen

sample_comments.title: Quiet Getaway with Stunning Views
sample_comments.text:
This is a place that feels truly quiet and far away from the hustle and bustle of city life; even when compared to Sapa town. It's much less touristy (at least in the area where we stayed), and I really appreciated the charming village vibe of this little hotel.

The breakfast was good, and the staff were very attentive to guests' needs. I also tried the massage service here; the prices were reasonable, and the masseur was skilled.

One of my favourite features was the bathtub on the balcony, which allowed me to enjoy a hot bath while soaking in the peaceful and serene surroundings. A wonderfully relaxing experience overall.

sample_comments.title: Eine wunderschöne, ruhige und dennoch zentral gelegene Unterkunft in Tam Coc !
sample_comments.positives: Eine super schöne und ruhige, aber dennoch zentral gelegene Unterkunft - mit dem Fahrrad oder Roller in wenigen Minuten direkt im Zentrum. Uns hat es unglaublich gut gefallen, für mich ist es die schönste Unterkunft in Tam Coc. Das Personal ist unglaublich nett und hilfsbereit - für alles wurde direkt eine Lösung gesucht und auch gefunden. Wir haben eine unglaublich schöne Zeit dort verbracht.
sample_comments.negatives: nichts- es war ideal!

sample_comments.title: Getaway in Ninh Binh
sample_comments.text:
We loved this hotel, the staff *** were very helpful. Especially *** who helped us to arrange a room for another night when our train got cancelled the day of departure. 

If you want away from the chaos of the Ninh Binh streets this is a good hideout. Although the walking street is just 5 mins away. 

Thank you ***!

sample_comments.title: Ruhig und angenehm
sample_comments.positives:
Es liegt sehr ruhig und abseits, aber dennoch kann man kurzerhand zur Hauptstraße in tam Coc gehen. Wer zu gemütlich ist, bucht einen Scooter oder ein Fahrrad direkt in der Unterkunft. 
Beim Frühstück gibt es frisch gemachtes Rührei/ Omlet. 
Alle waren sehr zuvorkommend. Wir hatten an einem Abend ein längeres Gespräch mit einem Angestellten, das war sehr schön. 
Die Klimaanlage kann sogar heizen, das Wetter änderte sich schlagartig von 27 grad auf 18 grad mit Regen. 18 grad ist sehr kalt mit der Luftfeuchtigkeit, wir haben die Funktion zum Heizen genutzt.

sample_comments.title: Wonderful time spent in Tam Coc
sample_comments.text: The hotel is beautiful in a lovely location surrounded by mountains a few minutes out of the city centre. The hotel arranged a motorbike rental for us which we used for exploring the region. It was so beautiful and relaxing, I would highly recommend! We loved our time here.

sample_comments.title: Ganz tolle Unterkunft, nur zu empfehlen
sample_comments.positives: Wunderschöne Unterkunft, super freundliches Personal, gutes Frühstück

sample_comments.title: Very nice place for families.
sample_comments.text: Green garden, beautiful swimming pool, cozy room with a large wooden bathtub, a bed so big that it's fit for three of us. Friendly staff, very helpful, and the free breakfast added more points for the five stars we gave.

sample_comments.title: Wir waren sehr zufrieden
sample_comments.positives:
- sehr modern
- klein, nicht so viele Zimmer
- schöner Ausblick 
- super nettes Personal

sample_comments.title: Peaceful location
sample_comments.text: Stayed 3 nights just after the typhoon and everything was great.. Beautiful breakfast, can walk or use hotel's bikes... some great restaurants and massage in town..

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Atmosfera tranquilla, tutto molto curato, facile da raggiungere dal centro città, anche la sera la strada è tutta illuminata e molto tranquilla!

sample_comments.title: Great stay!
sample_comments.text: the room is clean and worth the price, the staff is nice and helpful!

sample_comments.title: Ottima struttura a pochi passi dal centro
sample_comments.positives:
Posizione ottima, situata in una posizione tranquilla della città ma comunque a pochi passi dal centro. 
Struttura nuova e pulita.
Staff gentile e disponibile.
Colazione ottima

sample_comments.title: Beautiful location
